summary: Tested iteration 34 HR module (Onboarding, Employee 360, Leave). Backend 17/17 pytest pass (100%). Frontend pages load and render all expected sections for super_admin, but a CRITICAL React runtime crash occurs when submitting the New Onboarding form with the email field left blank — Pydantic 422 detail array is rendered raw by toast.error.

ui_bugs.issue: Uncaught React error: 'Objects are not valid as a React child (found object with keys {type, loc, msg, input, ctx})'. Occurs after clicking Create when email field is left blank — backend returns FastAPI 422 with detail array, and toast.error(e.response.data.detail) passes the array straight into React causing a full app crash.
ui_bugs.selector: Onboarding 'Create' button in New Onboarding dialog

ui_bugs.issue: Form sends email: '' (empty string) when blank instead of omitting it / null. Pydantic EmailStr rejects empty string → 422. Should send null or omit when empty.
Date pickers use native <input type='date'> (browser default) instead of shadcn Calendar/DatePicker for consistency.

integration_issues.flow: All HR pages — generic error handling
integration_issues.issue: Every catch block uses `toast.error(e.response?.data?.detail || ...)`. When the API returns 422 (validation error), detail is an array of objects → React crash. Need a helper that stringifies validation errors, e.g. `Array.isArray(detail) ? detail.map(d => d.msg).join(', ') : detail`.

action_items: FIX (CRITICAL): Onboarding.jsx — handle 422 validation error array; never pass raw object to toast.error/JSX. Add a util `formatApiError(err)` that flattens Pydantic detail array → string.
FIX (HIGH): Onboarding.jsx — strip/null empty optional fields (email, phone, department, joining_date, designation) before POST so EmailStr/etc. validators don't reject empty strings.
Recommend: apply same `formatApiError` helper across Employee360.jsx & Leave.jsx catch blocks for consistency.
Optional: replace native date inputs in Leave Apply form with shadcn Calendar component.
critical_code_review_comments: hr_router.py is 870 lines — close to the 700-line guideline. Consider splitting into hr/onboarding_router.py, hr/employee360_router.py, hr/leave_router.py.

leave_calendar endpoint $or condition does not cover leaves that SPAN the queried month (start before, end after). It only matches when either from_date or to_date falls inside the month. A leave from 2026-05-25 to 2026-06-05 viewed for June will still match (to_date in June), but a leave from 2026-05-20 to 2026-07-10 viewed for June would be MISSED. Consider adding the 'wraps the month' clause.
complete_onboarding default password 'Welcome@123' is hardcoded — fine for now, but should be configurable per-tenant env var.
_next_emp_code sorts E-XXXX lexicographically; after E-9999 (10k) it will pick E-999 over E-1000. Low risk now but consider numeric sort.
All write actions properly emit audit logs — good.

success_rate.frontend: 83% (10/12 UI checks; critical crash on form error path)

seed_data_creation: Created onboarding TEST_Joiner_QA → completed (employee E-XXXX, ppe row, induction, leave balances). Also created onboarding TEST_UI_Joiner_X via UI (in_progress). Leave applications created+approved/cancelled within test_iteration34_hr_module.py for balance assertions.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend layer fully verified. After main agent fixes the 422 error rendering + empty-string email payload in Onboarding.jsx, please re-run the UI flow: (1) New Onboarding with only Name filled → must show toast 'Name is required' or successful create, no React crash; (2) Open in_progress onboarding → verify Mark Done and Complete & Auto-Trigger buttons appear; (3) click Complete → verify Create login/PPE/Induction checkboxes and the green auto-trigger panel after confirm.
rca_of_the_issue: RCA: React crash 'Objects are not valid as a React child {type, loc, msg, input, ctx}' = FastAPI 422 ValidationError detail array. Reproduction: open /app/hr/onboarding → click New Onboarding → fill only Name 'TEST' → click Create. Server returns 422 because email='' fails EmailStr. Frontend catch block does `toast.error(e.response.data.detail)` — detail is an Array<ErrorObject>, sonner toast then renders it as React children → throwOnInvalidObjectType → app error boundary screen. Mitigation: (a) strip empty optional strings before submit; (b) add a util to stringify Pydantic 422 detail arrays.
